category_sources: Official strace homepage describes strace as a Linux syscall tracer and userspace utility for diagnostics and debugging.
source_facts.description says strace is a diagnostic, instructional, and debugging tool for the Linux kernel.
docs_sources: Official strace homepage links to the strace man page and official repositories.
source_facts.homepage is the official strace site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has the official repository URL https://github.com/strace/strace, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: Official strace homepage calls it a Linux syscall tracer.
source_facts.description identifies diagnostic and debugging use for the Linux kernel.
